name: Deep Sea Ring Galaxy
description: You have been assigned the Deep Sea Ring Galaxy — a peculiar ring galaxy that mirrors the mysteries of the deep ocean. Its brilliant golden nucleus is completely encircled by a distinct ring of deep-sea blue star formations, glowing in ethereal turquoise and sapphire like bioluminescent life drifting through the cosmic deep.

attributes.value: Golden nucleus surrounded by a ring of deep-sea blue star formations
